default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between ELSA (AI-powered English learning platform) and GrowthX (AI-enhanced content marketing agency) to explore potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ELSA offers AI-driven English learning for B2C and B2B markets, with personalized paths for various industries and purposes](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [GrowthX provides AI-powered content creation, SEO optimization, and LLM citation tracking services](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach: high-volume, quality content creation (50,000 words/month) with expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Potential areas for collaboration: content creation for ELSA's B2B segment, SEO optimization, and off-page SEO strategies](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)

## Topics

### ELSA's Business Model

  - [AI-powered English learning platform for both B2C and B2B markets](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [B2C: Subscription-based app for individual users (presentation skills, interview prep, travel, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [B2B: Bulk license sales to companies (100-1000 licenses)](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Global presence: HQ in US (Bay Area), research scientists in Europe](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Specialized English courses for different purposes, job functions, and industries](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [AI-driven personalized learning paths](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

### GrowthX's Services

  - [Content marketing agency using AI-enhanced workflows](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Services include content creation, SEO optimization, social media management, and LLM citation tracking](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Unique approach: Mix of AI workflows and expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Content creation process: Research, outline, drafting, style adaptation, internal linking, and human review](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Pricing: $9,000 for 50,000 words/month (for content and strategy)](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)

### AI-Powered Content Creation

  - [GrowthX uses AI to create higher quality content at larger volumes](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Publish more content initially, then double down on what works best](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Generate 50-80 articles per month vs. traditional 12 articles/month](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [AI assists in creating infographics and pulling quotes](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Faster results due to higher volume and ability to optimize based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)

### SEO and Off-Page Strategies

  - [GrowthX offers full-service SEO, including both on-page and off-page optimization](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Off-page SEO focuses on influencing citations and mentions across various platforms](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Track and influence how brands are mentioned in AI language models (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/s9BAsWg4wkEEk3JFtvSD3qA6QyPu9UAk?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
